summary: Completed comprehensive testing of DMS/RMS MVP. Backend APIs are fully functional with 100% success rate. Frontend has core functionality working but some UI component issues with Select elements causing modal dialogs to fail.

ui_bugs.issue: React runtime error: SelectItem must have a value prop that is not an empty string
ui_bugs.impact: Prevents modal dialogs from working properly (Declare Record, Legal Hold dialogs)

ui_bugs.issue: Declare as Record dialog not appearing due to Select component errors

integration_issues.issue: Modal dialog fails to open due to Select component validation errors

navigation_issues.issue: Page content headers don't match expected text in test selectors
navigation_issues.impact: Navigation works but content verification fails

passed_tests: Upload page navigation and file upload
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix Select component validation errors in frontend. All Select components in modals/dialogs need proper value props to prevent React runtime errors. This is blocking modal functionality for Declare Record and Legal Hold features.
